TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Piharatengan ci Uongu Yatauyogana == "Tayni ko Holand i, mala Holand tamdaw kita; Tayni sa ci Cen cenkong i, o Mincen tamdaw kita; Tayni sa ko Dipong i, mala Dipong tamdaw kita. anini ira ko Congko a tamdaw, papihakelongen to picalap i saripa' kita, awaay ko no niyah a kitakit." I 1925 mihecaan, o nano kacitodong to Wufongsiang (aniniay Alisansiang) kociw ci Uongu Yatauyogana (Kau Yisen) o nipidipot to finawlan ningra a makari'ang i 228 itiya, pala o "misimeday to tatiihay tamdaw", "mikelotay" saan ko pararaw no Komintang cingraan a micepet a rofoen. Itira i karofoan i, caay pisawad ci Uongu Yatauyogana to pafaloco'an, patilid cingra sowal sa: "Paso'elin kako ira ko cecay romi'ad mafana' to karorayan no faloco' ako, paso'elin kako o makoracay kako." Talolong ko sakionkako ni Uongu Yatauyogana, halinengneng cingra to tilid, fangacal ko nitilidan ningra. O nitilidan ningra saheto ka'ilol to fafahi, tango'or to wawa, ato kanga'ay to sakiikoray, tadamacekil ko minengnengay: "Pafeli ci Haruko Yukawa (Kau Cunfangan): To romi'ami'ad to kanikaran pasikakarayan mica'a minengneng to fo'is i, mahirateng ako ko demak iso, o dadaya to lafii i tahalemed ako kiso. wawaaw takaraw to ko lahad namo kiya. Cecayay tamdaw mipahafay to 'alomanay a wawa, matomingetefay to heci no tireng ato 'okak ko nikaroray." "Ka'ilolan ci Haruko Yukawa (Kau Cunfangan) ... to dadayadaya malemed ako kiso, nacila dadaya malemed kiso i papotal misacikacikay matawaay kako i lawac a lemed. O kalaliyasan a roi'ad caay ko kafana'an hakowaay ko romi'ad, mahirateng ira ko cecay romi'ad o malaliyaw miraoy to lipahakay a 'orip, hadidiaw no mita aca i." Maharateng no saka tosa wawa ni Uongu Yatauyogana, mapidah ko Dipong, tayni to ko Komintang itiya, malasang ko mama maca'it i kilang. Kalokelon han no finawlan miceli', awaay ko 'icel ningra paca'of: "Tayni ko Holand i, mala Holand tamdaw kita; Tayni sa ci Cen cenkong i, o Mincen tamdaw kita; Tayni sa ko Dipong i, mala Dipong tamdaw kita. anini ira ko Congko a tamdaw, papihakelongen to picalap i saripa' kita, awaay ko no niyah a kitakit." O tadakararoman no Taywan tamdaw itiyaay a to'ekan? Talacowa kareteng ko faloco', nika keriden haca ni Uongu Yatauyogana ko finawlan mihakelong to Komintang a sifo. Talacowa nano kaemangan ono Dipong a sowal ko ninanaman, nika mikowan to ko Komintang i, o hareteng no wawa to mama "o kociw ko tireng itiya, misa'icel minanam to sowal no kowaping". O nitilidan ni Uongu Yatauyogana a tilidan ira ko Dipong a tilid ira ko no kowaping, mafalic to kowaping nawhani tatiih mitilid to no Dipong. Talacowa itira i pirofoan itiya, papifalicen ningra ko cefang a marofo, nika ikor to tiliden nanay ko no salaloma'an a demak, saparatoh to 'ilol, misa'icel ko niyah no kowaping a tilid ko nitilidan: "Nai 1 folad 17 romi'ad ko patilid ako, saheto o no kowaping ko tild. Caay ka fana' kiso a mitiri', orasaka caay ka hemek kiso, kasini'adaab, o saka pitilid ako to no kowaping, caay ko rahodayay." "nawhani pakayni demak no laloma'an ita, caay ka sapakafana'aw ako to cefang ako, orasaka kako, piasimaanay to ako a mitilid ko nian. Ono kowaping a patilid ako, caay ka dengan o kafokilan ko laloma', halo katawaan to, palisomaden kako." Paikor i 'ayaw no nikapatay i, o amanga'ay ono Dipong a tilid ko saikoray a tilidan, malo saka tadamaan kacodaahan no tamdaw a sakiloma' a tilid: (ini ko salongan tilid) Kaiahan ci Haruko Yukawa (Kau Cunfangan): Nga'ay to kiso haw? Kafana'en ko nika tanektek no tireng iso, ikaka to maanan ko nikanga'ay. "Ano o ekim to, tada ekim to, fodawan to ko katadamaan i, caay ka ikaka ko tadamaan to saki wawa." mahireteng konini a radiw hakiya, ano ira to ko loa' ato sera o nga'ayay to. Nawhani ira ko 'alomanay tadamaanay a wawa, ano alaen ko dafodafong caay ko kakiharen. O pakaciraraw takowan, o mamasapinang to ano hakowaay… O palapalaan ato lotolotokan, ira itira ko salo'afang ako a midama. Akaa pa'aca to omah. Ci Uongu Yatauyogana Naikoran no pipatay, o horac a tireng ni Uongu Yatauyogana maalan no fafahi mitodoh ta panokayan tayra i Tapang itadem i loma', i kata'elif to no 40 mihecaan, itiya sa a pakafit to cinganganay a 'otoc no tadem, o tilid i 'otoc "ci olahay, ci 'ingtelay, awaay ko pisata'irang". Pakapi a sowal: 1. Pikim no Dipong to Takasago kiyukun i, mipahakelong ci Uongu Yatauyogana to citodongay no Dipong, nika ikaikor sa pasifana' to finawlan to akaa pikapot. Ikor nawhani o nikacango'ot no tamdaw, matefoc aca no kafafaw. 2.Tadamaan to ongkako ci Uongu Yatauyogana, patolon to sakakaay a waa tofafahiyan, itira i kapatayan romi'ad ningra i, pihawikid to pina a piru, pasonien ko ni Petofuen no kokyokyokudai 5-pan patengil miherateng cingraan nga'ay to. 3. O Conikku nisanga'an radiw "Lotok padama to kitakit" piharatengan ci Uongu Yatauyoganaan, o laloma' no radiw o pica'of to saikoray patilid to loma' nongra: "Mafali ko omah, tala 'alo i lotok, salo'afang no mako ko misimaway midamaay". 50 to'ek mihecaan tomeli'ay ka'angian demak papitiyolay yofayof
S.PHON: == piħaratəŋan ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana == "tajni ko~u ħo~uɾanɬ~ɮ i, maɾa ħo~uɾanɬ~ɮ tamɬ~ɮaw kita; tajni sa ʦi ʦən ʦənko~uŋ i, o~u minʦən tamɬ~ɮaw kita; tajni sa ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i, maɾa ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ tamɬ~ɮaw kita. anini ira ko~u ʦo~uŋko~u a tamɬ~ɮaw, papiħakəɾo~uŋən to~u piʦaɾap i saripaʡ kita, awaaj ko~u no~u nijaħ a kitakit." i **** miħəʦaan, o~u nano~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u wo~u~ufo~uŋsiaŋ (aniniaj aɾisansiaŋ) ko~uʦiw ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana (kao~u~u jisən) o~u nipiɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u finawɾan niŋra a makariʡaŋ i *** itija, paɾa o~u "misiməɬ~ɮaj to~u tatiiħaj tamɬ~ɮaw", "mikəɾo~utaj" saan ko~u pararaw no~u ko~umintaŋ ʦiŋraan a miʦəpət a ro~ufo~uən. itira i karo~ufo~uan i, ʦaaj pisawaɬ~ɮ ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana to~u pafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan, patiɾiɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra so~uwaɾ sa: "paso~uʡəɾin kako~u ira ko~u ʦəʦaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mafanaʡ to~u karo~urajan no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ako~u, paso~uʡəɾin kako~u o~u mako~uraʦaj kako~u." taɾo~uɾo~uŋ ko~u sakio~unkako~u ni o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana, ħaɾinəŋnəŋ ʦiŋra to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ, faŋaʦaɾ ko~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan niŋra. o~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan niŋra saħəto~u kaʡiɾo~uɾ to~u fafaħi, taŋo~uʡo~ur to~u wawa, ato~u kaŋaʡaj to~u sakiiko~uraj, taɬ~ɮamaʦəkiɾ ko~u minəŋnəŋaj: "pafəɾi ʦi ħaro~u~uko~u jo~u~ukawa (kao~u~u ʦo~u~unfaŋan): to~u ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u kanikaran pasikakarajan miʦaʡa minəŋnəŋ to~u fo~uʡis i, maħiratəŋ ako~u ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak iso~u, o~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja to~u ɾafii i taħaɾəməɬ~ɮ ako~u kiso~u. wawaaw takaraw to~u ko~u ɾaħaɬ~ɮ namo~u kija. ʦəʦajaj tamɬ~ɮaw mipaħafaj to~u ʡaɾo~umanaj a wawa, mato~umiŋətəfaj to~u ħəʦi no~u tirəŋ ato~u ʡo~ukak ko~u nikaro~uraj." "kaʡiɾo~uɾan ʦi ħaro~u~uko~u jo~u~ukawa (kao~u~u ʦo~u~unfaŋan) ... to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮajaɬ~ɮaja maɾəməɬ~ɮ ako~u kiso~u, naʦiɾa ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja maɾəməɬ~ɮ kiso~u i papo~utaɾ misaʦikaʦikaj matawaaj kako~u i ɾawaʦ a ɾəməɬ~ɮ. o~u kaɾaɾijasan a ro~uiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦaaj ko~u kafanaʡan ħako~uwaaj ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, maħiratəŋ ira ko~u ʦəʦaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ o~u maɾaɾijaw mirao~uj to~u ɾipaħakaj a ʡo~urip, ħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮiaw no~u mita aʦa i." maħaratəŋ no~u saka to~usa wawa ni o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana, mapiɬ~ɮaħ ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, tajni to~u ko~u ko~umintaŋ itija, maɾasaŋ ko~u mama maʦaʡit i kiɾaŋ. kaɾo~ukəɾo~un ħan no~u finawɾan miʦəɾiʡ, awaaj ko~u ʡiʦəɾ niŋra paʦaʡo~uf: "tajni ko~u ħo~uɾanɬ~ɮ i, maɾa ħo~uɾanɬ~ɮ tamɬ~ɮaw kita; tajni sa ʦi ʦən ʦənko~uŋ i, o~u minʦən tamɬ~ɮaw kita; tajni sa ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i, maɾa ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ tamɬ~ɮaw kita. anini ira ko~u ʦo~uŋko~u a tamɬ~ɮaw, papiħakəɾo~uŋən to~u piʦaɾap i saripaʡ kita, awaaj ko~u no~u nijaħ a kitakit." o~u taɬ~ɮakararo~uman no~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw itijaaj a to~uʡəkan? taɾaʦo~uwa karətəŋ ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, nika kəriɬ~ɮən ħaʦa ni o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana ko~u finawɾan miħakəɾo~uŋ to~u ko~umintaŋ a sifo~u. taɾaʦo~uwa nano~u kaəmaŋan o~uno~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a so~uwaɾ ko~u ninanaman, nika miko~uwan to~u ko~u ko~umintaŋ i, o~u ħarətəŋ no~u wawa to~u mama "o~u ko~uʦiw ko~u tirəŋ itija, misaʡiʦəɾ minanam to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ko~uwapiŋ". o~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan ni o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana a tiɾiɬ~ɮan ira ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ira ko~u no~u ko~uwapiŋ, mafaɾiʦ to~u ko~uwapiŋ nawħani tatiiħ mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. taɾaʦo~uwa itira i piro~ufo~uan itija, papifaɾiʦən niŋra ko~u ʦəfaŋ a maro~ufo~u, nika iko~ur to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮən nanaj ko~u no~u saɾaɾo~umaʡan a ɬ~ɮəmak, saparato~uħ to~u ʡiɾo~uɾ, misaʡiʦəɾ ko~u nijaħ no~u ko~uwapiŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan: "nai * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u patiɾiɬ~ɮ ako~u, saħəto~u o~u no~u ko~uwapiŋ ko~u tiɾɬ~ɮ. ʦaaj ka fanaʡ kiso~u a mitiriʡ, o~urasaka ʦaaj ka ħəmək kiso~u, kasiniʡaɬ~ɮaab~b~v, o~u saka pitiɾiɬ~ɮ ako~u to~u no~u ko~uwapiŋ, ʦaaj ko~u raħo~uɬ~ɮajaj." "nawħani pakajni ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan ita, ʦaaj ka sapakafanaʡaw ako~u to~u ʦəfaŋ ako~u, o~urasaka kako~u, piasimaanaj to~u ako~u a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u nian. o~uno~u ko~uwapiŋ a patiɾiɬ~ɮ ako~u, ʦaaj ka ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u kafo~ukiɾan ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡ, ħaɾo~u katawaan to~u, paɾiso~umaɬ~ɮən kako~u." paiko~ur i ʡajaw no~u nikapataj i, o~u amaŋaʡaj o~uno~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u saiko~uraj a tiɾiɬ~ɮan, maɾo~u saka taɬ~ɮamaan kaʦo~uɬ~ɮaaħan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw a sakiɾo~umaʡ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ: (ini ko~u saɾo~uŋan tiɾiɬ~ɮ) kaiaħan ʦi ħaro~u~uko~u jo~u~ukawa (kao~u~u ʦo~u~unfaŋan): ŋaʡaj to~u kiso~u ħaw? kafanaʡən ko~u nika tanəktək no~u tirəŋ iso~u, ikaka to~u maanan ko~u nikaŋaʡaj. "ano~u o~u əkim to~u, taɬ~ɮa əkim to~u, fo~uɬ~ɮawan to~u ko~u kataɬ~ɮamaan i, ʦaaj ka ikaka ko~u taɬ~ɮamaan to~u saki wawa." maħirətəŋ ko~unini a raɬ~ɮiw ħakija, ano~u ira to~u ko~u ɾo~uaʡ ato~u səra o~u ŋaʡajaj to~u. nawħani ira ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj taɬ~ɮamaanaj a wawa, ano~u aɾaən ko~u ɬ~ɮafo~uɬ~ɮafo~uŋ ʦaaj ko~u kakiħarən. o~u pakaʦiraraw tako~uwan, o~u mamasapinaŋ to~u ano~u ħako~uwaaj* o~u paɾapaɾaan ato~u ɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan, ira itira ko~u saɾo~uʡafaŋ ako~u a miɬ~ɮama. akaa paʡaʦa to~u o~umaħ. ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana naiko~uran no~u pipataj, o~u ħo~uraʦ a tirəŋ ni o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana maaɾan no~u fafaħi mito~uɬ~ɮo~uħ ta pano~ukajan tajra i tapaŋ itaɬ~ɮəm i ɾo~umaʡ, i kataʡəɾif to~u no~u ** miħəʦaan, itija sa a pakafit to~u ʦiŋaŋanaj a ʡo~uto~uʦ no~u taɬ~ɮəm, o~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ i ʡo~uto~uʦ "ʦi o~uɾaħaj, ʦi ʡiŋtəɾaj, awaaj ko~u pisataʡiraŋ". pakapi a so~uwaɾ: *. pikim no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u takasa*o~u kijo~u~uko~u~un i, mipaħakəɾo~uŋ ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana to~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, nika ikaiko~ur sa pasifanaʡ to~u finawɾan to~u akaa pikapo~ut. iko~ur nawħani o~u nikaʦaŋo~uʡo~ut no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, matəfo~uʦ aʦa no~u kafafaw. *.taɬ~ɮamaan to~u o~uŋkako~u ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana, pato~uɾo~un to~u sakakaaj a waa to~ufafaħijan, itira i kapatajan ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ niŋra i, piħawikiɬ~ɮ to~u pina a piro~u~u, paso~uniən ko~u ni pəto~ufo~u~uən no~u ko~ukjo~ukjo~uko~u~uɬ~ɮai *-pan patəŋiɾ miħəratəŋ ʦiŋraan ŋaʡaj to~u. *. o~u ʦo~unikko~u~u nisaŋaʡan raɬ~ɮiw "ɾo~uto~uk paɬ~ɮama to~u kitakit" piħaratəŋan ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*anaan, o~u ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u raɬ~ɮiw o~u piʦaʡo~uf to~u saiko~uraj patiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u ɾo~umaʡ no~uŋra: "mafaɾi ko~u o~umaħ, taɾa ʡaɾo~u i ɾo~uto~uk, saɾo~uʡafaŋ no~u mako~u ko~u misimawaj miɬ~ɮamaaj". ** to~uʡək miħəʦaan to~uməɾiʡaj kaʡaŋian ɬ~ɮəmak papitijo~uɾaj jo~ufajo~uf
S.FORM: == Piharatengan ci Uongu Yatauyogana == "Tayni ko Holand i, mala Holand tamdaw kita; Tayni sa ci Cen cenkong i, o Mincen tamdaw kita; Tayni sa ko Dipong i, mala Dipong tamdaw kita. anini ira ko Congko a tamdaw, papihakelongen to picalap i saripa' kita, awaay ko no niyah a kitakit." I 1925 mihecaan, o nano kacitodong to Wufongsiang (aniniay Alisansiang) kociw ci Uongu Yatauyogana (Kau Yisen) o nipidipot to finawlan ningra a makari'ang i 228 itiya, pala o "misimeday to tatiihay tamdaw", "mikelotay" saan ko pararaw no Komintang cingraan a micepet a rofoen. Itira i karofoan i, caay pisawad ci Uongu Yatauyogana to pafaloco'an, patilid cingra sowal sa: "Paso'elin kako ira ko cecay romi'ad mafana' to karorayan no faloco' ako, paso'elin kako o makoracay kako." Talolong ko sakionkako ni Uongu Yatauyogana, halinengneng cingra to tilid, fangacal ko nitilidan ningra. O nitilidan ningra saheto ka'ilol to fafahi, tango'or to wawa, ato kanga'ay to sakiikoray, tadamacekil ko minengnengay: "Pafeli ci Haruko Yukawa (Kau Cunfangan): To romi'ami'ad to kanikaran pasikakarayan mica'a minengneng to fo'is i, mahirateng ako ko demak iso, o dadaya to lafii i tahalemed ako kiso. wawaaw takaraw to ko lahad namo kiya. Cecayay tamdaw mipahafay to 'alomanay a wawa, matomingetefay to heci no tireng ato 'okak ko nikaroray." "Ka'ilolan ci Haruko Yukawa (Kau Cunfangan) ... to dadayadaya malemed ako kiso, nacila dadaya malemed kiso i papotal misacikacikay matawaay kako i lawac a lemed. O kalaliyasan a roi'ad caay ko kafana'an hakowaay ko romi'ad, mahirateng ira ko cecay romi'ad o malaliyaw miraoy to lipahakay a 'orip, hadidiaw no mita aca i." Maharateng no saka tosa wawa ni Uongu Yatauyogana, mapidah ko Dipong, tayni to ko Komintang itiya, malasang ko mama maca'it i kilang. Kalokelon han no finawlan miceli', awaay ko 'icel ningra paca'of: "Tayni ko Holand i, mala Holand tamdaw kita; Tayni sa ci Cen cenkong i, o Mincen tamdaw kita; Tayni sa ko Dipong i, mala Dipong tamdaw kita. anini ira ko Congko a tamdaw, papihakelongen to picalap i saripa' kita, awaay ko no niyah a kitakit." O tadakararoman no Taywan tamdaw itiyaay a to'ekan? Talacowa kareteng ko faloco', nika keriden haca ni Uongu Yatauyogana ko finawlan mihakelong to Komintang a sifo. Talacowa nano kaemangan ono Dipong a sowal ko ninanaman, nika mikowan to ko Komintang i, o hareteng no wawa to mama "o kociw ko tireng itiya, misa'icel minanam to sowal no kowaping". O nitilidan ni Uongu Yatauyogana a tilidan ira ko Dipong a tilid ira ko no kowaping, mafalic to kowaping nawhani tatiih mitilid to no Dipong. Talacowa itira i pirofoan itiya, papifalicen ningra ko cefang a marofo, nika ikor to tiliden nanay ko no salaloma'an a demak, saparatoh to 'ilol, misa'icel ko niyah no kowaping a tilid ko nitilidan: "Nai 1 folad 17 romi'ad ko patilid ako, saheto o no kowaping ko tild. Caay ka fana' kiso a mitiri', orasaka caay ka hemek kiso, kasini'adaab, o saka pitilid ako to no kowaping, caay ko rahodayay." "nawhani pakayni demak no laloma'an ita, caay ka sapakafana'aw ako to cefang ako, orasaka kako, piasimaanay to ako a mitilid ko nian. Ono kowaping a patilid ako, caay ka dengan o kafokilan ko laloma', halo katawaan to, palisomaden kako." Paikor i 'ayaw no nikapatay i, o amanga'ay ono Dipong a tilid ko saikoray a tilidan, malo saka tadamaan kacodaahan no tamdaw a sakiloma' a tilid: (ini ko salongan tilid) Kaiahan ci Haruko Yukawa (Kau Cunfangan): Nga'ay to kiso haw? Kafana'en ko nika tanektek no tireng iso, ikaka to maanan ko nikanga'ay. "Ano o ekim to, tada ekim to, fodawan to ko katadamaan i, caay ka ikaka ko tadamaan to saki wawa." mahireteng konini a radiw hakiya, ano ira to ko loa' ato sera o nga'ayay to. Nawhani ira ko 'alomanay tadamaanay a wawa, ano alaen ko dafodafong caay ko kakiharen. O pakaciraraw takowan, o mamasapinang to ano hakowaay… O palapalaan ato lotolotokan, ira itira ko salo'afang ako a midama. Akaa pa'aca to omah. Ci Uongu Yatauyogana Naikoran no pipatay, o horac a tireng ni Uongu Yatauyogana maalan no fafahi mitodoh ta panokayan tayra i Tapang itadem i loma', i kata'elif to no 40 mihecaan, itiya sa a pakafit to cinganganay a 'otoc no tadem, o tilid i 'otoc "ci olahay, ci 'ingtelay, awaay ko pisata'irang". Pakapi a sowal: 1. Pikim no Dipong to Takasago kiyukun i, mipahakelong ci Uongu Yatauyogana to citodongay no Dipong, nika ikaikor sa pasifana' to finawlan to akaa pikapot. Ikor nawhani o nikacango'ot no tamdaw, matefoc aca no kafafaw. 2.Tadamaan to ongkako ci Uongu Yatauyogana, patolon to sakakaay a waa tofafahiyan, itira i kapatayan romi'ad ningra i, pihawikid to pina a piru, pasonien ko ni Petofuen no kokyokyokudai 5-pan patengil miherateng cingraan nga'ay to. 3. O Conikku nisanga'an radiw "Lotok padama to kitakit" piharatengan ci Uongu Yatauyoganaan, o laloma' no radiw o pica'of to saikoray patilid to loma' nongra: "Mafali ko omah, tala 'alo i lotok, salo'afang no mako ko misimaway midamaay". 50 to'ek mihecaan tomeli'ay ka'angian demak papitiyolay yofayof
S.PHON: == piħaratəŋan ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana == "tajni ko~u ħo~uɾanɬ~ɮ i, maɾa ħo~uɾanɬ~ɮ tamɬ~ɮaw kita; tajni sa ʦi ʦən ʦənko~uŋ i, o~u minʦən tamɬ~ɮaw kita; tajni sa ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i, maɾa ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ tamɬ~ɮaw kita. anini ira ko~u ʦo~uŋko~u a tamɬ~ɮaw, papiħakəɾo~uŋən to~u piʦaɾap i saripaʡ kita, awaaj ko~u no~u nijaħ a kitakit." i **** miħəʦaan, o~u nano~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u wo~u~ufo~uŋsiaŋ (aniniaj aɾisansiaŋ) ko~uʦiw ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana (kao~u~u jisən) o~u nipiɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u finawɾan niŋra a makariʡaŋ i *** itija, paɾa o~u "misiməɬ~ɮaj to~u tatiiħaj tamɬ~ɮaw", "mikəɾo~utaj" saan ko~u pararaw no~u ko~umintaŋ ʦiŋraan a miʦəpət a ro~ufo~uən. itira i karo~ufo~uan i, ʦaaj pisawaɬ~ɮ ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana to~u pafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan, patiɾiɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra so~uwaɾ sa: "paso~uʡəɾin kako~u ira ko~u ʦəʦaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mafanaʡ to~u karo~urajan no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ako~u, paso~uʡəɾin kako~u o~u mako~uraʦaj kako~u." taɾo~uɾo~uŋ ko~u sakio~unkako~u ni o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana, ħaɾinəŋnəŋ ʦiŋra to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ, faŋaʦaɾ ko~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan niŋra. o~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan niŋra saħəto~u kaʡiɾo~uɾ to~u fafaħi, taŋo~uʡo~ur to~u wawa, ato~u kaŋaʡaj to~u sakiiko~uraj, taɬ~ɮamaʦəkiɾ ko~u minəŋnəŋaj: "pafəɾi ʦi ħaro~u~uko~u jo~u~ukawa (kao~u~u ʦo~u~unfaŋan): to~u ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u kanikaran pasikakarajan miʦaʡa minəŋnəŋ to~u fo~uʡis i, maħiratəŋ ako~u ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak iso~u, o~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja to~u ɾafii i taħaɾəməɬ~ɮ ako~u kiso~u. wawaaw takaraw to~u ko~u ɾaħaɬ~ɮ namo~u kija. ʦəʦajaj tamɬ~ɮaw mipaħafaj to~u ʡaɾo~umanaj a wawa, mato~umiŋətəfaj to~u ħəʦi no~u tirəŋ ato~u ʡo~ukak ko~u nikaro~uraj." "kaʡiɾo~uɾan ʦi ħaro~u~uko~u jo~u~ukawa (kao~u~u ʦo~u~unfaŋan) ... to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮajaɬ~ɮaja maɾəməɬ~ɮ ako~u kiso~u, naʦiɾa ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja maɾəməɬ~ɮ kiso~u i papo~utaɾ misaʦikaʦikaj matawaaj kako~u i ɾawaʦ a ɾəməɬ~ɮ. o~u kaɾaɾijasan a ro~uiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦaaj ko~u kafanaʡan ħako~uwaaj ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, maħiratəŋ ira ko~u ʦəʦaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ o~u maɾaɾijaw mirao~uj to~u ɾipaħakaj a ʡo~urip, ħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮiaw no~u mita aʦa i." maħaratəŋ no~u saka to~usa wawa ni o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana, mapiɬ~ɮaħ ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, tajni to~u ko~u ko~umintaŋ itija, maɾasaŋ ko~u mama maʦaʡit i kiɾaŋ. kaɾo~ukəɾo~un ħan no~u finawɾan miʦəɾiʡ, awaaj ko~u ʡiʦəɾ niŋra paʦaʡo~uf: "tajni ko~u ħo~uɾanɬ~ɮ i, maɾa ħo~uɾanɬ~ɮ tamɬ~ɮaw kita; tajni sa ʦi ʦən ʦənko~uŋ i, o~u minʦən tamɬ~ɮaw kita; tajni sa ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i, maɾa ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ tamɬ~ɮaw kita. anini ira ko~u ʦo~uŋko~u a tamɬ~ɮaw, papiħakəɾo~uŋən to~u piʦaɾap i saripaʡ kita, awaaj ko~u no~u nijaħ a kitakit." o~u taɬ~ɮakararo~uman no~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw itijaaj a to~uʡəkan? taɾaʦo~uwa karətəŋ ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, nika kəriɬ~ɮən ħaʦa ni o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana ko~u finawɾan miħakəɾo~uŋ to~u ko~umintaŋ a sifo~u. taɾaʦo~uwa nano~u kaəmaŋan o~uno~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a so~uwaɾ ko~u ninanaman, nika miko~uwan to~u ko~u ko~umintaŋ i, o~u ħarətəŋ no~u wawa to~u mama "o~u ko~uʦiw ko~u tirəŋ itija, misaʡiʦəɾ minanam to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ko~uwapiŋ". o~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan ni o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana a tiɾiɬ~ɮan ira ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ira ko~u no~u ko~uwapiŋ, mafaɾiʦ to~u ko~uwapiŋ nawħani tatiiħ mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. taɾaʦo~uwa itira i piro~ufo~uan itija, papifaɾiʦən niŋra ko~u ʦəfaŋ a maro~ufo~u, nika iko~ur to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮən nanaj ko~u no~u saɾaɾo~umaʡan a ɬ~ɮəmak, saparato~uħ to~u ʡiɾo~uɾ, misaʡiʦəɾ ko~u nijaħ no~u ko~uwapiŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan: "nai * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u patiɾiɬ~ɮ ako~u, saħəto~u o~u no~u ko~uwapiŋ ko~u tiɾɬ~ɮ. ʦaaj ka fanaʡ kiso~u a mitiriʡ, o~urasaka ʦaaj ka ħəmək kiso~u, kasiniʡaɬ~ɮaab~b~v, o~u saka pitiɾiɬ~ɮ ako~u to~u no~u ko~uwapiŋ, ʦaaj ko~u raħo~uɬ~ɮajaj." "nawħani pakajni ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan ita, ʦaaj ka sapakafanaʡaw ako~u to~u ʦəfaŋ ako~u, o~urasaka kako~u, piasimaanaj to~u ako~u a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u nian. o~uno~u ko~uwapiŋ a patiɾiɬ~ɮ ako~u, ʦaaj ka ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u kafo~ukiɾan ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡ, ħaɾo~u katawaan to~u, paɾiso~umaɬ~ɮən kako~u." paiko~ur i ʡajaw no~u nikapataj i, o~u amaŋaʡaj o~uno~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u saiko~uraj a tiɾiɬ~ɮan, maɾo~u saka taɬ~ɮamaan kaʦo~uɬ~ɮaaħan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw a sakiɾo~umaʡ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ: (ini ko~u saɾo~uŋan tiɾiɬ~ɮ) kaiaħan ʦi ħaro~u~uko~u jo~u~ukawa (kao~u~u ʦo~u~unfaŋan): ŋaʡaj to~u kiso~u ħaw? kafanaʡən ko~u nika tanəktək no~u tirəŋ iso~u, ikaka to~u maanan ko~u nikaŋaʡaj. "ano~u o~u əkim to~u, taɬ~ɮa əkim to~u, fo~uɬ~ɮawan to~u ko~u kataɬ~ɮamaan i, ʦaaj ka ikaka ko~u taɬ~ɮamaan to~u saki wawa." maħirətəŋ ko~unini a raɬ~ɮiw ħakija, ano~u ira to~u ko~u ɾo~uaʡ ato~u səra o~u ŋaʡajaj to~u. nawħani ira ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj taɬ~ɮamaanaj a wawa, ano~u aɾaən ko~u ɬ~ɮafo~uɬ~ɮafo~uŋ ʦaaj ko~u kakiħarən. o~u pakaʦiraraw tako~uwan, o~u mamasapinaŋ to~u ano~u ħako~uwaaj* o~u paɾapaɾaan ato~u ɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan, ira itira ko~u saɾo~uʡafaŋ ako~u a miɬ~ɮama. akaa paʡaʦa to~u o~umaħ. ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana naiko~uran no~u pipataj, o~u ħo~uraʦ a tirəŋ ni o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana maaɾan no~u fafaħi mito~uɬ~ɮo~uħ ta pano~ukajan tajra i tapaŋ itaɬ~ɮəm i ɾo~umaʡ, i kataʡəɾif to~u no~u ** miħəʦaan, itija sa a pakafit to~u ʦiŋaŋanaj a ʡo~uto~uʦ no~u taɬ~ɮəm, o~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ i ʡo~uto~uʦ "ʦi o~uɾaħaj, ʦi ʡiŋtəɾaj, awaaj ko~u pisataʡiraŋ". pakapi a so~uwaɾ: *. pikim no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u takasa*o~u kijo~u~uko~u~un i, mipaħakəɾo~uŋ ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana to~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, nika ikaiko~ur sa pasifanaʡ to~u finawɾan to~u akaa pikapo~ut. iko~ur nawħani o~u nikaʦaŋo~uʡo~ut no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, matəfo~uʦ aʦa no~u kafafaw. *.taɬ~ɮamaan to~u o~uŋkako~u ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana, pato~uɾo~un to~u sakakaaj a waa to~ufafaħijan, itira i kapatajan ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ niŋra i, piħawikiɬ~ɮ to~u pina a piro~u~u, paso~uniən ko~u ni pəto~ufo~u~uən no~u ko~ukjo~ukjo~uko~u~uɬ~ɮai *-pan patəŋiɾ miħəratəŋ ʦiŋraan ŋaʡaj to~u. *. o~u ʦo~unikko~u~u nisaŋaʡan raɬ~ɮiw "ɾo~uto~uk paɬ~ɮama to~u kitakit" piħaratəŋan ʦi o~u~uo~uŋo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*anaan, o~u ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u raɬ~ɮiw o~u piʦaʡo~uf to~u saiko~uraj patiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u ɾo~umaʡ no~uŋra: "mafaɾi ko~u o~umaħ, taɾa ʡaɾo~u i ɾo~uto~uk, saɾo~uʡafaŋ no~u mako~u ko~u misimawaj miɬ~ɮamaaj". ** to~uʡək miħəʦaan to~uməɾiʡaj kaʡaŋian ɬ~ɮəmak papitijo~uɾaj jo~ufajo~uf
